architecture.frontend: Next.js App Router (front/src/app/admin/servicios). Stateful UI managed by custom hooks (useServiciosData, useServiciosActions). Component structure split into Header, KPIs, Table, and Modals.
architecture.backend: Express.js REST API. Controllers handling logic, Sequelize for ORM. New model `HistorialPrecioProducto` will be created.

api_endpoints.response: List of { id, nombre, precioActual, categoriaId, activo, ... }
{ total: number, activos: number, categorias: number, masSolicitado: { nombre, cantidad } }

api_endpoints.payload: { nombre (str, req), precioActual (num, req, >0), categoriaId (num, req), costoEstimado (num, opt, >=0), tiempoEstimadoMinutos (num, opt, >0) }

api_endpoints.behavior: If precioActual changes, trigger creation of HistorialPrecioProducto entry before updating.

api_endpoints.response: List of { id, precioAnterior, precioNuevo, createdAt } ordered by createdAt DESC.

frontend_state.modalsState: isOpen state for Create, Edit, and History modals
frontend_state.zod_schemas: Used in react-hook-form to match backend validations precisely.

design_and_dependencies.ui_libraries: Tailwind CSS, Radix UI (Dialog, DropdownMenu), Lucide React.
design_and_dependencies.animation: GSAP (@gsap/react) for `.fade-item` stagger on table mount, mirroring /pedidos page.
design_and_dependencies.forms: react-hook-form + zod for client-side validations that strictly mirror backend expectations.

phased_implementation_plan.phase_1: Backend Models & DB Migration. Create HistorialPrecioProducto model and associate it. Build/update routes and controllers for /api/productos and /api/categorias-producto.
phased_implementation_plan.phase_2: Frontend Hooks & Services. Create fetchers (useServiciosData, useServiciosActions) and configure endpoints.
phased_implementation_plan.phase_3: Frontend UI Components. Build Header, KPIs, and Table with GSAP animations.
phased_implementation_plan.phase_4: Frontend Forms & Modals. Implement react-hook-form with zod schemas for Create/Edit Service and View History.
